prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.4 kg; Height 164.4 cm; BMI 25.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.7%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.7%), FPG (12 months ago 212mg/dL; 9 months ago 196mg/dL; 6 months ago 276mg/dL; 3 months ago 231mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.9kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 68.9kg; 3 months ago 67.3kg; current 68.4kg), Height (12 months ago 164.4cm; 9 months ago 164.4cm; 6 months ago 164.4cm; 3 months ago 164.4cm; current 164.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 41U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 37U/L), AST (12 months ago 38U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 41U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; current 42mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 146mg/g; 9 months ago 199mg/g; 6 months ago 166mg/g; 3 months ago 176mg/g; current 220mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 93mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 152mg/dL; 9 months ago 150mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
